heading: Establishment of best practices for evidence retention
label: 40728 Establishment of best practices for evidence retention
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14136f of Title 42

children.text: establish best practices for evidence retention to focus on the preservation of forensic evidence; and
assist State, local, and tribal governments in adopting and implementing the best practices established under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Deadline
children.label: b Deadline
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Director of the National Institute of Justice shall publish the best practices established under subsection (a)(1).December 16, 2016

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to require or obligate compliance with the best practices established under subsection (a)(1).
